list.title: BckdCanvasClass#addLayer
list.description: Adds a new layer of images. All layers must share the same frame count.

list.title: BckdCanvasClass#clear
list.description: Clears the background canvas.

list.title: BckdCanvasClass#draw
list.description: Draws the image for the given layer/frame, scaling it down to fit within canvasContainer if it's larger than the canvas in either dimension. Updates the global {@link scale} factor used in CSV export.

list.title: BckdCanvasClass#layers
list.description: Array of per-layer image arrays.

list.title: Command#execute
list.description: Executes (or redoes) the command. Must be implemented by subclasses.

list.title: Command#undo
list.description: Undoes the command. Must be implemented by subclasses.

list.title: CommandGroup#addCommand
list.description: Adds a command to this group.

list.title: CommandGroup#commands
list.description: Commands belonging to this group, in execution order.

list.title: CommandGroup#execute
list.description: Executes every command in the group, in order.

list.title: CommandGroup#undo
list.description: Undoes every command in the group, in reverse order.

list.title: Concrete Commands
list.description: Each concrete command extends Command and implements a constructor (saving everything needed to execute/undo/redo), execute() (which also serves as redo()), and undo().

list.title: Concrete Commands.AddPointCommand#frame
list.description: Saves the frame the shape was created on in case it needs to be undone/redone.

list.title: Concrete Commands.CloseShapeCommand#frame
list.description: Saves the frame the shape was created on in case it needs to be undone/redone.

list.title: Concrete Commands.ColorChangeCommand#oldColor
list.description: The original stroke color of the shape.

list.title: Concrete Commands.ContourDeleteCommand#frame
list.description: Saves the frame the shape was created on in case it needs to be undone/redone.

list.title: Concrete Commands.CreateShapeCommand#frame
list.description: Saves the frame the shape was created on in case it needs to be undone/redone.

list.title: Concrete Commands.CreateShapeCommand#shape
list.description: Saves the shape object so redo reuses the same shape instance.

list.title: Concrete Commands.DragPointCommand#frame
list.description: Saves the frame the shape was created on in case it needs to be undone/redone.

list.title: Concrete Commands.DragPointCommand#modified_before
list.description: Stores whether this shape has been modified

list.title: Concrete Commands.DragShapeCommand#frame
list.description: Saves the frame the shape was created on in case it needs to be undone/redone.

list.title: Concrete Commands.DragShapeCommand#modified_before
list.description: Stores whether this shape has been modified

list.title: Concrete Commands.FramePauseCommand#pause_frame
list.description: The frame the shape was paused on

list.title: Concrete Commands.FramePauseCommand#startPoints
list.description: Deep copy of the shape's per-frame points before pausing.

list.title: Concrete Commands.InsertPointCommand#frame
list.description: Saves the frame the shape was created on in case it needs to be undone/redone.

list.title: Concrete Commands.LabelChangeCommand#oldLabel
list.description: The shape's label before it was changed.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#_selection
list.description: The currently selected shape, or null if none.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#_shapes
list.description: All shapes currently in this session.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#addShape
list.description: Adds a shape to the {@link DrawCanvasClass}.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#changeSelectedShapeColor
list.description: Applies a color change to the selected shape via a {@link ColorChangeCommand}, if a shape is selected.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#changeSelectedShapeLabel
list.description: Applies a label change to the selected shape via a {@link LabelChangeCommand}, if a shape is selected.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#clear
list.description: Clears the drawing canvas.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#deSelect
list.description: Clears the current selection and resets the contour-editor UI (color picker, label field, pause/delete buttons) to their no-selection state. Deactivates any provisional points on the previously selected shape.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#deleteSelectedShape
list.description: Deletes the selected shape (via {@link ContourDeleteCommand}), if any.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#doDoubleClick
list.description: Handles double-click on the canvas. If the select tool is active and the double-click lands on the selected shape, shows transparent provisional midpoint markers (via {@link Shape#setUpProvisionalPoints|Shape.setUpProvisionalPoints()}) so the user can click one to insert a new point there.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#doDown
list.description:
Handles mousedown/touchstart on the canvas. Behavior depends on {@link currentTool}:

  • Select tool (0): begins a point-drag or shape-drag if the cursor is over a handle/shape, inserts a point if hovering a provisional marker, or selects/deselects a shape under the cursor.
  • Pen tool (1): starts a new shape if none is selected, otherwise adds a point to the selected shape (closing it if clicking near its first point).

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#doMove
list.description: Handles mousemove/touchmove on the canvas. If a drag is in progress, calls the corresponding drag command. Otherwise, with the select tool active and a shape selected, updates {@link DrawCanvasClass#expectResize|DrawCanvasClass.expectResize}/ {@link DrawCanvasClass#expectInsert|DrawCanvasClass.expectInsert} and the cursor style based on what the cursor is currently hovering (a selection handle, a provisional point, the shape body, or nothing).

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#doUp
list.description: Handles mouseup/touchend on the canvas: ends any in-progress drag and command group.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#dragState
list.description:
Info about an in-progress drag, or null if the user isn't dragging.

The parameter mode: 'body' is in effect when the user is dragging the whole shape.

The parameter mode: 'point' is in effect when the user is dragging a single selection handle.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#draw
list.description: Redraws all shapes for the given frame. If "overlay last" is checked, also draws the previous frame's shapes at 50% opacity as a reference ghost.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#expectInsert
list.description: Index of the selected shape's provisional points that the cursor is hovering over, or -1 if none.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#expectResize
list.description: Index of the selection handle the cursor is hovering over, -1 if none.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#getMaxNumPoints
list.description: Returns the largest number of points any single shape has on any single frame, across all shapes. Used to size the coordinate columns of the exported CSV header.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#getPos
list.description: Translates a mouse/touch event's page coordinates into coordinates relative to the drawing canvas's top-left corner.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#pauseSelectedShape
list.description: Pauses the selected shape (via {@link FramePauseCommand}), if any.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#removeSelectedShape
list.description: Removes the currently selected shape from the session, if any, and deselects.

list.title: HistoryManager#beginCommandGroup
list.description: Begins collecting subsequent {@link HistoryManager#executeCommand|HistoryManager.executeCommand} calls into a single {@link CommandGroup} rather than separate history entries. Call when a continuous user gesture (drag, multi-step action) begins, and then ends with {@link HistoryManager#endCommandGroup|HistoryManager.endCommandGroup}.

list.title: HistoryManager#currentCommandGroup
list.description: The command group currently being built, if grouping is active.

list.title: HistoryManager#endCommandGroup
list.description: Ends the current command group (started via {@link HistoryManager#beginCommandGroup|HistoryManager.beginCommandGroup}) and pushes it to history as a single undoable unit, if it contains at least one command.

list.title: HistoryManager#executeCommand
list.description: Executes a command immediately. If a command group is active, the command is added to that group instead of being pushed to history on its own; otherwise it's pushed to {@link HistoryManager#history|HistoryManager.history} directly and the redo stack is cleared.

list.title: HistoryManager#groupingActive
list.description: Whether commands are currently being collected into {@link HistoryManager#currentCommandGroup|HistoryManager.currentCommandGroup} instead of pushed to history individually.

list.title: HistoryManager#history
list.description: Commands executed, oldest first.

list.title: HistoryManager#maxHistorySize
list.description: Maximum number of history entries kept before the oldest is dropped.

list.title: HistoryManager#redo
list.description: Re-executes the most recently undone command/group, moving it back to history and redraws the current frame.

list.title: HistoryManager#redoStack
list.description: Stack that keeps undone commands, ready to redo.

list.title: HistoryManager#undo
list.description: Undoes the most recent command/group in history, moving it to the redo stack and redraws the current frame.

list.title: Shape#_frames
list.description: Map of frame index -> array of points on that frame.

list.title: Shape#_modified
list.description: Map of frame index -> whether the shape was explicitly modified on that frame.

list.title: Shape#_provisionalPoints
list.description: Transparent midpoint markers shown when editing points; see {@link Shape#setUpProvisionalPoints|Shape.setUpProvisionalPoints}.

list.title: Shape#addPoint
list.description: Adds a point to the shape on the current and all future frames.

list.title: Shape#deactivateProvisionalPoints
list.description: Clears provisional points and exits point-editing mode.

list.title: Shape#deleteLastPoint
list.description: Deletes the last point of the shape from the current and all future frames.

list.title: Shape#deletePoint
list.description: Deletes the point at idx from the current and all future frames.

list.title: Shape#distToSegment
list.description: Computes the shortest distance from the mouse cursor position (px, py) to the line segment from a to b.

list.title: Shape#draw
list.description: Draws the shape's outline for frameIndex onto ctx, plus selection handles and/or provisional point markers if this shape is selected. Does nothing if the shape doesn't exist (is paused) on frameIndex.

list.title: Shape#getModified
list.description: Whether the shape was explicitly modified on the given frame.

list.title: Shape#getPoints
list.description: The shape's points on the given frame.

list.title: Shape#hitTest
list.description: Tests whether (mx, my) is within tolerance px of any segment of the shape on the current frame.

list.title: Shape#insertPoint
list.description: Inserts a point — taken from the cached provisional point at the given point-array index — into the shape's point array, on the current and all future frames.

list.title: Shape#pause
list.description: Pauses the shape: sets its points to null on the current and all future frames (so it stops being drawn/exported on those frames), deselects it, and redraws.

list.title: Shape#resetProvisionalPoints
list.description: Fully recomputes provisional points from the shape's current point layout. This should be called after any change to the shape's points (insert, delete, drag) so the provisional points are always current.

list.title: Shape#setModified
list.description: Sets whether the shape was explicitly modified on the given frame.

list.title: Shape#setUpProvisionalPoints
list.description: Computes transparent midpoint markers ("provisional points") for each segment of the shape on the current frame that's longer than 18px, so the user has a clickable target to insert a new point into that segment. Skips if provisional points are already active (editingPoints is true) — call {@link Shape#resetProvisionalPoints|Shape.resetProvisionalPoints()} to force a recompute instead.

list.title: Shape#unpause
list.description: Reverses {@link Shape#pause|Shape.pause()} by restoring the shape's per-frame points and re-selecting it.

list.title: accessToken
list.description: Cached Drive API access token, persisted in localStorage so the user isn't re-prompted every session until it expires.

list.title: bckdClass
list.description: The background-canvas controller for this session.

list.title: canvasContainer
list.description: The canvas the user sees is actually two stacked canvases: bckdCanvas (the background map/radar imagery) and drawCanvas (user-drawn shapes). Both live inside the canvasContainer div. See {@link https://www.w3schools.com/graphics/canvas_drawing.asp|more info about the Canvas API}

list.title: changeFrame
list.description: Changes the current frame: updates {@link frameIdx}, syncs the frame slider/label, and redraws.

list.title: createImage
list.description: Creates an Image object from a Google Drive file. Fetches the file as binary data via the Drive API, converts it to a Blob, and loads that Blob into an Image element.

list.title: createPicker
list.description: Create and render a Google Picker object for searching images.

list.title: currentTool
list.description: The drawing tool currently selected: 0 = select, 1 = pen, 2 = pan.

list.title: downloadAll
list.description: Runs the full export pipeline: renders every frame/layer to images, builds the shape-data CSV, and bundles both into a downloaded zip.

list.title: downloadCsv
list.description: Builds the exported CSV of shape data. The first row is a META row carrying the current {@link scale} factor (so exported pixel coordinates can be mapped back to original image resolution). The header row is sized dynamically to the largest point count across all shapes/frames (see {@link DrawCanvasClass#getMaxNumPoints|DrawCanvasClass.getMaxNumPoints()}). One data row is written per shape per frame on which that shape exists (i.e. isn't paused).

list.title: downloadImageFrames
list.description: Renders every layer/frame combination (background + drawn shapes) to a flattened PNG blob, using a temporary off-screen canvas so the visible canvases aren't disturbed. Restores the original layer/frame view afterward.

list.title: drawClass
list.description: The drawing-canvas controller for this session.

list.title: drawRequestedFrame
list.description: Redraws both canvases for the current global frame/layer. Called whenever the frame or layer changes.

list.title: editingPoints
list.description: Whether the currently selected shape is showing transparent "provisional" midpoint markers for point insertion.

list.title: frameIdx
list.description: Index of the frame currently being displayed.

list.title: gapiLoaded
list.description: Callback after api.js is loaded.

list.title: generateZipDownload
list.description: Bundles exported PNG frames and the shape-data CSV into a single downloaded zip file (trax_output.zip).

list.title: gisInited
list.description: Whether Google Identity Services has finished initializing.

list.title: gisLoaded
list.description: Callback after Google Identity Services are loaded.

list.title: handleAuthClick
list.description: Sign in the user upon button click.

list.title: handleSignoutClick
list.description: Sign out the user upon button click.

list.title: initCanvasFunctionality
list.description: Sets up the canvases, canvas classes, and event listeners after the Google Drive Picker callback (i.e. once the user has selected map images for the first time in this session).

list.title: initializePicker
list.description: Callback after the API client is loaded. Loads the discovery doc to initialize the API.

list.title: layerFilenameArrays
list.description: Array of arrays of image filenames, one inner array per layer, used to label exported CSV rows.

list.title: layerIdx
list.description: Index of the map layer currently being displayed.

list.title: maybeEnableButtons
list.description: Enables user interaction after all libraries are loaded.

list.title: numFrames
list.description: Total number of frames loaded into the app.

list.title: numLayers
list.description: Total number of layers loaded into the app.

list.title: overlayOpacity
list.description: Opacity of the "overlay last" layer as a decimal out of 1.

list.title: pickerCallback
list.description: Callback once the user has picked file(s) in the Google Picker. Converts each picked doc into an Image (via {@link createImage}), sorts them by filename, and either initializes the canvases for the first time this session ({@link initCanvasFunctionality}) or adds them as a new layer ({@link BckdCanvasClass#addLayer}). If adding a layer fails because the frame count doesn't match, reopens the picker so the user can pick a matching set.

list.title: pickerInited
list.description: Whether the Google Picker API has finished initializing.

list.title: positionPanel
list.description: Positions the opacity panel in the lower-left corner of the canvas container

list.title: resizeCanvases
list.description:
Resizes both canvases to fill canvasContainer and redraws.

Currently disabled (not called) because shape coordinates don't currently adjust when the canvas resizes, so shapes visually shift out of place relative to the background image.

list.title: scale
list.description: Scale factor each background image was drawn at, relative to its native size. Recorded in exported CSV metadata so coordinates can be mapped back to original image pixels.

list.title: setLayerOpacity
list.description: Set the opacity of the shape or overlay layer based on the slider value and update the corresponding label.

list.title: shapeOpacity
list.description: Opacity of the shape layer as a decimal out of 1.

list.title: showOpacityPanel
list.description: Shows or hides the opacity panel for the shape or overlay layer, and hides the other panel if it's open.

list.title: switchToDraw
list.description: Switches to the pen/draw tool (1): updates {@link currentTool}, the tool radio, and the cursor.

list.title: switchToSelect
list.description: Switches to the select tool (0): updates {@link currentTool}, the tool radio, and the cursor.

list.title: tokenClient
list.description: OAuth2 token client from Google Identity Services, initialized in {@link gisLoaded}.

list.title: trax_app.js
list.description: TRAX: Web app to perform meteorological analysis through the drawing of contours

list.title: viewport
list.description: Object representing the user's view of the canvas, i.e., a camera able to zoom and pan around the canvas.
